About

Student bio

I build clean, responsive websites using semantic HTML, handcrafted CSS, and plain JavaScript. My work is grounded in accessible layout, modern animation, and a polished user experience.

As a 3rd-year IT student at STI San Jose Del Monte, I combine academic knowledge with hands-on development and growing QA skills to deliver dependable digital work.
